svg.text: Done! I built your Pong — open the
— Workspace, Window mode (revised): chat-centric, clearer windows, taskbar + desktop shortcuts

g.text: Raised surface + visible border + strong shadow — clearly above the desktop. Windows stack/overlap.
The primary surface, front-most. Game Runner on the right (focus). Code Editor lower-left.
Roomy enough to read code; peeks from the left/bottom so kids know it's there (secondary).
Re-open a closed window by clicking its desktop icon.
Restore/switch windows; holds the layout toggle. Active window highlighted.
Fills the whole desktop above the taskbar (not half); switch windows via the taskbar.
Clean line icons for window controls, titles, toolbar & toggle — no emoji.
